question_text: Use the timeline shown below of nineteenth-century European nationalism. Which event came immediately after the Congress of Vienna?

answer_key.explanation: After the Congress of Vienna in 1815, the next major nationalist upheaval was the July Revolution in France in 1830.

visual.caption: European nationalism milestones.
visual.altText: Linear timeline marking five major political milestones in nineteenth-century Europe in chronological order from left to right.
